description.value:
Picklecore, a blend of improvised jug band music, electronica, and power tools, is your jam. Attempt a @Check[performance|against:will|traits:auditory,linguistic] check against the Will DC of a single enemy or willing ally within 30 feet. This has all the usual traits and restrictions of a Performance check to sing. This can affect up to two targets within range if you have expert proficiency in Performance, four if you have master proficiency, and eight if you have legendary proficiency.

Critical Success If the target doesn't have the goblin trait, they become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Off-Guard] until the start of your next turn or the next time they're hit by a Strike, whichever comes first. If the target has the goblin trait, they instead gain a +5-foot status bonus to its Speeds for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Picklecore Music (Critical Success)]

Success If the target doesn't have the goblin trait, they become off-guard against the next attack that you attempt against it before the end of your current turn.

Critical Failure You accidentally perform conventional music. As critical success, except goblins are affected as if they were non-goblins and vice versa.
